summary: Tested all P1 features: partner/customer signup red * markers, admin Taxes tab 5 sub-tabs, Invoice Settings save flow, Tax Summary panel, Subscriptions/Orders Tax column, Portal Invoice button logic, InvoiceViewer page render with 5 templates. Backend: 19 passed, 1 skipped. Frontend: All major flows working.

minor.issue: items array contains raw product_id (UUID) instead of product_name - InvoiceViewer falls back to showing UUID as item description. Backend does not JOIN product names from order_items collection

action_items: Fix invoice items showing product UUID instead of product name: In /backend/routes/taxes.py invoice endpoint (line 260), after fetching order_items, look up product names from products collection using item.product_id and add product_name field to each item before returning
critical_code_review_comments: Invoice endpoint (taxes.py:260) fetches order_items but doesn't populate product_name - results in UUID displayed on invoice as line item description. Fix: JOIN products collection to get name for each item.
Tax Summary aggregation uses $limit of months*10 which is fine for small datasets but may be insufficient for large ones (consider pagination)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major flows pass, minor issue: no paid orders to test Invoice button click in portal)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and working: (1) Partner signup /signup?type=partner has * in 4 required field placeholders + '* Required field' note. (2) Customer signup (via bright-accounting/login -> Create an account) has red * in labels for Full Name, Company Name, Email, Password. (3) Admin Taxes tab has 5 sub-tabs: Tax Settings, Rate Table, Override Rules, Invoice Settings, Tax Summary. (4) Invoice Settings: all form elements present, save with INV/Net 30/Modern succeeds with toast. (5) Tax Summary: 3 cards (all showing 0 values - no taxed orders). (6) Subscriptions table has Tax column. (7) Orders table has Tax column. (8) Portal page loads for mark@markchen.local but no paid orders (Invoice button only shows for paid/completed - code verified). (9) InvoiceViewer /invoice/:orderId renders with 5 template options (Classic, Modern, Minimal, Professional, Branded), Print/Save PDF button, error on invalid orderId. Only bug found: invoice line items show product UUID instead of name when product_name is not stored in order_items.

rca_of_issue.issue: Invoice shows product UUID instead of product name
rca_of_issue.root_cause: GET /api/orders/{id}/invoice fetches order_items documents directly (line 260 of taxes.py). The order_items collection stores product_id but does not store product_name. InvoiceViewer.tsx correctly uses `item.product_name || item.product_id` but since product_name is always null/missing, the UUID fallback is used.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: Login as admin, go to /invoice/{any_order_id} - line items show UUID like c78861cd-ef89-40fa-b9c6-e4dee2e382d6 instead of product name
rca_of_issue.mitigation: In taxes.py invoice endpoint after line 260, collect all product_ids from items, query products collection for those IDs, build a product_id->name map, then enrich each item with product_name before returning. Example fix: product_ids = [i.get('product_id') for i in items if i.get('product_id')]; products = await db.products.find({'id': {'$in': product_ids}}, {'_id': 0, 'id': 1, 'name': 1}).to_list(len(product_ids)); pmap = {p['id']: p['name'] for p in products}; items = [{**i, 'product_name': pmap.get(i.get('product_id', ''), '')} for i in items]
